blended.narrative: Bridger Bowl is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 7.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 7" over the past week. Current depth: 31".
